# DataPrivacyOf (dataprivacyof.ai)

> Privacy-grade AI from training to inference.

Automate Data Protection Impact Assessments, map personal-data flows through your AI systems, and prove GDPR and EU AI Act compliance end to end.

## What this is
DataPrivacyOf is a vertical in the CSOAI Hive — EU AI Act / NIS2 / DORA compliant tooling exposed as Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers callable by any AI agent.

## MCP tools
- data-privacy-dpia-mcp.assess: Generate or update a GDPR DPIA for an AI use case from any MCP client or workflow.
- pii-detection-mcp.scan: Detect personal data in prompts, datasets and outputs and suggest minimisation actions.

## Discovery
- Agent card: https://dataprivacyof.ai/agent.json
- MCP catalog: https://dataprivacyof.ai/.well-known/mcp.json
- Sitemap: https://dataprivacyof.ai/sitemap.xml
- Hive registry: https://csoai.org (271 published MCP servers)

## Pricing
See https://dataprivacyof.ai/pricing/
